# Awesome BSD

> A curated entry point for BSD operating systems, communities, documentation, and ecosystem software.

## Canonical Context

Read `README.md` first. It is the canonical human-readable and agent-readable source of truth. This file is only a compact discovery pointer.

## Agent Notes

* Keep `README.md` canonical; do not reintroduce generated sidecar indexes by default.
* Run `git diff --check`; CI checks markdown hygiene and links.
